etimesEid ul-Fitr 2026 India: When will the Moon be sighted, timings, date, last day of the fast, and all you need to knowAs Ramadan concludes, Muslim communities worldwide anticipate Eid al-Fitr, the festival of breaking the fast. The exact date hinges on the sighting of the Shawwal crescent moon on Chand Raat, marking the end of dawn-to-dusk fasts and ushering in celebrations of gratitude, feasts, and family reunions.

etimesWho was Robert Goddard? The father of Modern Rocketry, whose 100-year-old cabbage field invention will propel NASA's Artemis 2 rocketRobert Goddard's 1926 launch of the first liquid-fueled rocket, though modest, marked a pivotal moment in rocketry. His foundational principles, including turbopumps and gimbaling engines, are now integral to NASA's Artemis 2 mission, which will send astronauts around the moon, a testament to his enduring legacy.

etimesWho is Kamila Jurkus? Model cheering IndyCar's David Malukas, while Daniel Dye faces suspension over 'gay voice' jokeA livestream comment by NASCAR driver Daniel Dye, who imitated IndyCar driver David Malukas' "gay voice," led to Dye's indefinite suspension and public apology. The incident brought attention to Malukas' personal life, including his girlfriend, civil engineer and model Kamila Jurkus.
